title: Can't set output of combinatorial logic

features.name: always_comb driving variable used in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with blocking assignments to a variable that is subsequently used in an always_ff block

features.name: vpi_access_to_always_comb_driven_signal
features.description: Code should include a signal driven by always_comb that is accessed via VPI from C++ to trigger the bug
